scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix admin
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.clean:
rmdir /s /q node_modules && rmdir /s /q backend
ode_modules && rmdir /s /q frontend
ode_modules && rmdir /s /q admin
ode_modules
